stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"It was uncreative because it only required one movement and it had very simple controls. ","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was very hard to control and keep it a steady pace when I was doing the middle part. That part was hard and frustrating because how sensitive moving the panel is. ","authenticity-rating":1,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":3,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I would say it is pretty good for this setting. I mean it was used for science so that makes it a little better. "}
